edit.title: Edit user
edit.notFoundDescription: This user does not exist or could not be loaded.
edit.emailUnverifyHint: Changing the email will unverify this account.
edit.selfRoleHint: You can't change your own role.
edit.selfDeactivateHint: You can't deactivate your own account.
edit.confirmDescription: Deactivate {{username}}? They will be cut off on their next request and can't sign in until reactivated.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.description: Assign profiles to grant this user their screens.
profiles.adminNote: All profiles and screens are assigned to the admin.

delete.title: Delete module
delete.description: Delete "{{name}}"? Screens must be removed first.

dialog.lockedHint: System module — the key is locked; name, description and order can change.
dialog.activeHint: Inactive modules are hidden when targeting screens; existing screens keep working.
dialog.confirmDescription: Deactivate "{{name}}"? It will be hidden when targeting screens; existing screens keep working.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.description: A profile bundles screen grants assigned to users.

delete.title: Delete profile
delete.description: Delete "{{name}}"? Only profiles not assigned to any user can be deleted.

dialog.title: New profile
dialog.description: A profile bundles screen grants you assign to users. Configure its grants after creating it.

detail.defaultHintCurrent: This is the default profile. Enable Default on another profile to move it.
detail.activeHint: Inactive profiles are hidden when assigning profiles to users; existing assignments keep working.
detail.grantsDescription: Move screens to "Granted", pick each screen's permissions, and choose one landing screen.

confirmDefault.title: Replace default profile
confirmDefault.description: The current default profile is: {{name}}. Do you confirm that you want to replace it as the default?

confirmRemove.title: Remove disabled screen
confirmRemove.description: This screen is disabled — if you remove it you can't re-add it until it's re-enabled. Remove?

confirmDeactivate.title: Deactivate profile
confirmDeactivate.description: Deactivate "{{name}}"? It will be hidden when assigning profiles to users; existing assignments keep working.

screens.title: Screens
screens.description: Screens are what access grants attach to.

delete.title: Delete screen
delete.description: Delete "{{name}}"? Only screens not assigned to any profile can be deleted.

dialog.description: A screen is the unit access grants attach to.
dialog.lockedHint: System screen — module, key and path are locked; only name, description and order can change.
dialog.activeHint: Inactive screens are hidden from the "add" pickers; existing assignments keep working.
dialog.onHint: Emergency kill switch — turning this off blocks the screen for everyone (except admins) right away.

confirmDeactivate.title: Deactivate screen
confirmDeactivate.description: Deactivate "{{name}}"? It will be hidden from the add pickers; current assignments keep working until removed.

confirmKill.title: Turn screen off
confirmKill.description: Turn "{{name}}" off? It stops working immediately for everyone except admins.

permissions.title: Permissions — {{name}}
permissions.description: Curate the operations this screen offers and give each a friendly label.
permissions.empty: No permissions yet — add one above.

delete.title: Delete permission
delete.description: Delete "{{label}}"? Profiles that granted it keep working only if it isn't in use.
